description_long: This is a classic black leather dress shoe with a low-profile silhouette and a rounded toe. The upper is smooth and slightly glossy, featuring subtle stitching details and a standard lace-up closure with thin black laces. The shoe has a wooden-look sole with a stacked heel, providing a refined contrast to the dark upper. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort. The overall design is formal and suitable for business or dress occasions, with a timeless and versatile appearance. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A black leather dress shoe with a smooth upper, standard lacing, and a wooden-look sole. It has a classic, formal design with subtle stitching and a rounded toe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth black leather upper, subtle stitching, and the wooden-look sole and heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the stacked heel and the shoe's symmetrical back profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the clean lines and the lace-up closure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe, lacing system, and the slightly glossy finish of the upper.
